name: as-select:created
description: Fired when component is rendered. Has detail object.

name: as-select:updated
description: Fired when component receives [updated] attribute. This should happen each time <SELECT> element within is being updated with JS. [updated] attribute on the component forces re-render of the component. Has detail object.

name: as-select:selected
description: Fired when option is selected. Has detail object.

name: as-select:show
description: Fired when dropdown is shown. Has detail object.

name: as-select:hide
description: Fired when dropdown is hid. Has detail object.

name: as-select:search
description: Fired when user start typing within component's <INPUT> element. Has detail object.

name: as-select-multiple:created
description: Fired when component is rendered. Has detail object.

name: as-select-multiple:show
description: Fired when dropdown is shown. Has detail object.

name: as-select-multiple:hide
description: Fired when dropdown is hid. Has detail object.

name: as-select-multiple:selected
description: Fired when option is selected. Has detail object.

name: as-select-multiple:deselected
description: Fired when option is deselected. Has detail object.

name: as-select-multiple:search
description: Fired when user start typing within component's <INPUT> element. Has detail object.

name: as-select2range:created
description: Fired when component is rendered. Has detail object.

name: as-select2range:created
description: Fired when component is not created due to element not being <SELECT multiple>. Throws console error. Has detail object.

name: as-select2range:selected
description: Fired when option is selected. Has detail object.

name: as-popout:created
description: Fired when component is rendered. Has detail object.

name: as-popout:toggle
description: Fired when popout is opened. Has detail object.

name: as-popout:toggle
description: Fired when popout is closed. Has detail object.

name: as-panel:created
description: Fired when component is rendered. Has detail object.

name: as-panel:toggle
description: Fired when component has toggled. Has detail object.

name: as-panel:toggle
description: Fired when component has toggled. Has detail object.

name: as-table-sort:created
description: Fired when component is created. Has detail object.

name: as-table-sort:created
description: Fired when component detects that there's no table to work with within component. Has detail object.

name: as-table-sort:sorted
description: Fired when any of the columns is being sorted. Has detail object.

name: as-table-sort:sorted
description: Fired when sorting is being reset to default. Has detail object.

name: as-table-sort:filtered
description: Fired when any of the columns is being filtered. Has detail object.

name: as-table-sort:filtered
description: Fired when filters are being set to default. Has detail object.

name: as-table-actions:popover
description: Fired when popover with action buttons is opened. Has detail object.

name: as-table-actions:popover
description: Fired when popover with action buttons is closed. Has detail object.

name: as-drawer:created
description: Fired when component is instantiated, has detail object.

name: as-drawer:before-open
description: Fired when component is about to be opened, has detail object.

name: as-drawer:after-open
description: Fired when component has finished opening and transition time has elapsed, has detail object.

name: as-drawer:before-close
description: Fired when component is about to be closed, has detail object.

name: as-drawer:after-close
description: Fired when component has finished closing and transition time has elapsed, has detail object.

name: as-table-actions:download
description: Fired when COPY button is clicked, has detail object.

name: as-table-actions:download
description: Fired when MD button is clicked, has detail object.

name: as-table-actions:download
description: Fired when XLS button is clicked, has detail object.

name: as-table-actions:download
description: Fired when CSV button is clicked, has detail object.

name: as-date-picker:created
description: Fires when date picker component is created. Has detail object.

name: as-date-picker:breakpoint
description: Fires when date picker checks breakpoint value to modify component behaviour. Has detail object.

name: as-date-picker:open
description: Fires when calendar popout is shown. Has detail object.

name: as-date-picker:closed
description: Fires when calendar popout is closed. Has detail object.

name: as-date-picker:changed
description: Fires when user picks another date. Has detail object.

name: as-tab-group:created
description: Fired when component is instantiated. Has detail object.

name: as-show-hide-password:show
description: Fires when password is shown. Has no detail object.

name: as-show-hide-password:hide
description: Fires when password is hidden. Has no detail object.

name: as-tab-group:selected
description: Fired when component tab is clicked and selected. Has detail object.

name: as-char-counter:created
description: Fired when component is created. Has detail object.

name: as-char-counter:count
description: Fired when count changes

name: as-form-validation:success
description: Fired when field validation returns no error. Has detail object.

name: as-form-validation:error
description: Fired when field validation error. Has detail object
